creator: michael@mjsdigital.com
text:
Patch to update devel/ruby-gems to 0.9.5

Fix: I am submitting this myself due to a maintainer timeout.


PORTNAME=      gems
-PORTVERSION=   0.9.4
+PORTVERSION=   0.9.5
 CATEGORIES=    devel ruby
 MASTER_SITES=  ${MASTER_SITE_RUBYFORGE}
 MASTER_SITE_SUBDIR=    ruby${PORTNAME}



How-To-Repeat: 	Patch
